content: agent2: implementing 'Add error_threshold parameter to quantize()' - will modify src/PIL/Image.py (quantize method) and Tests/test_image_quantize.py. Let me know if you're touching quantize() too.

agent2: I've already added error_threshold param to quantize() in src/PIL/Image.py — signature is now: quantize(self, colors=256, method=None, kmeans=0, palette=None, dither=1, error_threshold=0). Logic: after RGBA validation, palette branch is unchanged/returns early. In the non-palette branch, if error_threshold>0 I call a new helper self._quantize_to_error_threshold(colors, method, kmeans, error_threshold) instead of self.im.quantize(colors, method, kmeans) directly, then continues to the same 'im.palette = ImagePalette...' assignment and final return. I also added two new methods below quantize(): _quantization_error and _quantize_to_error_threshold. Please add your sort_palette param AFTER error_threshold in the signature, and do your palette sorting right before the final 'return im' (after the im.palette= line) — that should not conflict with my code. Let me know once you've edited so I can re-check the diff.
